scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui && npm run test:bdd && npm run test:perf && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.allure:open: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const file=path.resolve('allure-report','index.html'); if (process.platform==='win32') execSync('start "" "' + file + '"', {stdio:'inherit', shell:true}); else if (process.platform==='darwin') execSync('open "' + file + '"', {stdio:'inherit', shell:true}); else execSync('xdg-open "' + file + '"', {stdio:'inherit', shell:true});"
